svg.text: What to add, tune, or remove — prioritised by alpha yield
Priority 1 — add now (high alpha, low build cost)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add a regime filter to MAXJEDIALPHA that detects trending vs ranging market conditions?')
sendPrompt('How do I add ATR-based volatility regime scoring to the MAXJEDIALPHA execution layer?')
sendPrompt('How do I add relative strength ranking to MAXJEDIALPHA as a Bank D or overlay layer?')
sendPrompt('How do I add options flow dark pool confirmation as a hard filter gate in MAXJEDIALPHA?')

svg.text: Priority 2 — add next (medium build, real edge)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add a macro correlation filter to MAXJEDIALPHA that penalises signals conflicting with VIX and DXY?')
sendPrompt('How do I add time-of-day and session weighting to MAXJEDIALPHA so algos get down-weighted outside prime hours?')
sendPrompt('How do I add earnings and catalyst calendar blocking to MAXJEDIALPHA so it goes flat before high-risk events?')
sendPrompt('How do I add per-algo performance decay tracking to MAXJEDIALPHA so poor-performing algos get auto-downweighted?')

svg.text: Priority 3 — tune existing knobs (no new code needed)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the optimal bank hierarchy weight split A:B:C for MAXJEDIALPHA and how do I backtest it?')
sendPrompt('Should I raise the GO threshold above 12 in MAXJEDIALPHA and what are the tradeoffs?')
sendPrompt('How do I tune the DANGER X-energy threshold in MAXJEDIALPHA to reduce false squeeze signals?')
sendPrompt('How do I tune the JEDI lambda blend weight in MAXJEDIALPHA execution?')

svg.text: Remove or downweight — signals with low alpha or high noise cost

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Should I remove or downweight the HARMONIC LENS algo from MAXJEDIALPHA Bank B and why?')
sendPrompt('Should I downweight RENKO VAULT in MAXJEDIALPHA given it lags other Bank B trend algos?')
sendPrompt('Is the DRAGONFLY VOL sector RS algo in Bank C still adding alpha or duplicating DV with other signals?')
sendPrompt('Does the 8-EMA ribbon algo in Bank B add edge beyond what Celtic Cross EMA stack already covers?')

svg.text: Formula vulnerabilities — fix before scaling to auto

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the problem with using a raw unweighted sum for Jedi score in MAXJEDIALPHA and how do I fix it?')
sendPrompt('How do I add signal freshness decay to MAXJEDIALPHA so old votes lose weight over time?')
sendPrompt('What is the DEAD MARKET threshold problem in MAXJEDIALPHA if conviction sits at exactly 25%?')

svg.text: Execution signal — new layers to wire into finalScore

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I wire a notional size scalar based on ATR to MAXJEDIALPHA execution so position size adjusts with volatility?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a drawdown circuit breaker to MAXJEDIALPHA that suspends execution after losses?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a Bank A BOOM confirmation requirement so GO only fires when Bank A also has majority long votes?')
